examples: Let's just chill at home tonight.
We spent the weekend chilling by the pool.
context: Everyone says that Busan is so chill and laid back.

examples: Here's a complimentary drink on the house.
She was very complimentary about your work.
context: But we had to take advantage of the complimentary champagne that they have here.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: You can definitely get lit here.

examples: Drink water so you don't get dehydrated.
I felt dehydrated after running in the heat.
The doctor said I was severely dehydrated.
context: I feel a little bit dehydrated.

examples: She literally ran a marathon yesterday.
The store is literally around the corner.
context: He literally was a pigeon whisperer.

examples: Add some seasoning to the soup.
The seasoning on this steak is perfect.
Korean cooking uses a lot of different seasonings.
